title: LocaleGuard configuration
description: Configuration for the LocaleGuard localization quality gate.

framework.description: Framework preset that fills sensible defaults.

messageFormat.description: How JSON locale values are interpreted.

sourceLocale.description: Reference locale every other locale is compared against.

localesPath.description: Directory holding locale files, relative to the config.

include.description: Glob patterns of source files to analyze.

ignore.description: Glob patterns to exclude from code analysis.

blockOn.description: Issue types that fail the check (non-zero exit).

unusedKeys.description: Report locale keys never referenced in code.

baseline.description: Path to a baseline file of pre-existing issues to suppress.
